title: [3.14] gh-146056: Fix repr() for lists and tuples containing NULLs (GH-146129)
author: serhiy-storchaka
body:
(cherry picked from commit 0f2246b1553f401da5ade47e0fd1c80ad7a8dfa5)

# Pull Request title

```

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

Most PRs will require an issue number. Trivial changes, like fixing a typo, do not need an issue.

# Backport Pull Request title

please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```

comments.author: serhiy-storchaka
comments.body: Note that no `versionchanged` was added for the API change in #146201 (I do not think that it is needed).

comments.body:

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @serhiy-storchaka, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.13` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker 796513306fdc1184452ea644b485f83511f39528 3.13
```
